title: Industrial Relics
lines: You scavenge through the rusted ruins of the machinery. Among the gears and twisted pistons, you find things that were never meant to be manufactured: delicate, metallic wings that pulse with a faint light, and cylinders of a glass-like substance filled with a swirling, violet gas.
Everything here is a fusion of the industrial and the biological. You find a small, brass device that looks like a compass, but the needle points upward, toward the golden lattice on the ceiling.
The deeper you search, the more you feel the vibration of the factory in your very bones.

options.desc: Return to the main factory floor
